summary: Plan-only classification for a live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. All five hydrated PRs are open, non-security-sensitive, and independently scoped; no close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is safe or allowed from this job.

actions.reason: Independent open PR in this inventory shard; keep for maintainer review rather than closing or merging from plan mode.
